{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Aetheric matter
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Aetheric matter]] is a substance that can be carved out by shots.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
